metadata.name: Set Up a New Customer Account

description: A new retailer needs to be set up in the system before they can place their first order.

nodes.task_description: Gather all necessary information from the new customer (business name, address, tax ID, etc.).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has all the required data.

nodes.task_description: Create the new customer account in the CRM and ERP systems.
Assign a sales representative and default payment terms to the account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent configures the new account with the correct settings.
